Skills.Name: Galvanism
Skills.Description: Lightning mastery. Electric-element spells deal +25% damage when the target is Wet or Electrified. Wet targets are natural conductors; Electrified targets compound. Synergizes with the lightning_plus_conductor material reaction.

Powers.Name: Ground Strike
Powers.Description: +50% melee damage on Electrified targets, applied as bonus Electric damage. The current already in the target couples to your blade and discharges.

Powers.Name: Shock Retort
Powers.Description: When an attack on you misses, your static aura jumps to the attacker — 3 Electric damage.

Powers.Name: Overload
Powers.Description: Active ability: fire a lightning bolt up to 8 cells in a chosen direction. Damages every Wet or Electrified creature it passes through; non-conductors break the chain. 50-turn cooldown.
